## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `ilx ...`
2. Type command `...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste any error output below.

```
<paste error output here>
```

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.12.3)
- ILX AI CLI version: (run `ilx --version`)
- Ollama version (if applicable):

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log excerpts that may help diagnose the issue.
Log file location: `~/.ilx_cli/logs/audit.log`
